steps.title: Identify what the notes show about Asia versus Thailand
steps.content: Masters et al. documents that farm sizes are rising in Asia, supporting the farm-size transition hypothesis, while Promkhambut et al. shows that Thai rice farms remained small despite modernizing—creating a regional divergence that determines whether the hypothesis applies.

steps.title: Choose the answer that uses both pieces of evidence
steps.content:
Choice D claims the hypothesis may apply to some Asian countries but is inconsistent with Thailand, directly synthesizing the Masters et al. and Promkhambut et al. findings.

B cites only Promkhambut et al. and ignores the broader Asian pattern; A contradicts the notes; C omits Thailand entirely.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
